title: Minecraft Heroes
description: Adds 3 unique Hero Hearts that are only lost when killed by another player. These hearts don’t vanish from mob damage or accidents, making PvP encounters more impactful and strategic. Protect your hearts and prove your strength in battle!
body:
**Minecraft Heroes** adds a new layer of challenge and strategy to your Minecraft experience by introducing **3 unique Hero Hearts**. These special hearts are separate from your regular health and can **only be lost when you're killed by another player** — not from mobs, fall damage, or other hazards.

Perfect for PvP-focused servers or competitive survival worlds, this mod makes every player encounter count. Protect your Hero Hearts, fight with purpose, and rise as a true hero (or villain) in your world!
